name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies (2)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups all purpose or unbleached flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees C).
2. Place the butter or margarine in a heatproof glass dish. Cover and microwave on high power for 30 seconds.
3. In a large bowl, mix together pumpkin, sugar, melted butter or margarine, beaten egg, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture, and mix until smooth.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts (if using).
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a lightly greased baking sheet, spacing them about 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Bake for ten to twelve minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Cool on the baking sheet for two minutes before transferring to a wire rack to finish cooking.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
